comments: Repeated 0001, altered model sizes & utilized corrected processed dataset

generation.comment: Stage 1 trains the residual AE. Stage 2 trains the latent rectified-flow generator conditioned on the deterministic modular-DT model.

dataset.comment: The generative dataset uses canonical_cycle full-grid snapshots, not point chunks. Cylinder-order randomization is kept for train split to preserve set/permutation semantics.

deterministic_model.comment: Required for stage 2. The frozen deterministic model provides organized-state and dense field conditioning.

architecture.comment: AE latent size is roughly H/8 x W/8. Increase latent_ch or decrease n_levels if AE reconstructions blur too much.

loss.comment: Stage-1 AE loss is intentionally simple: MSE+L1 on normalized residual grids.

conditioning.comment: Dense condition maps include deterministic mean, residual, field, xy, tau, and Re. Global condition vector pools deterministic organizer aux outputs.

architecture.comment: Velocity UNet operates in AE latent space. Global organizer condition is injected through adaptive GroupNorm FiLM.

sampling.comment: Use euler for speed during early experiments; heun gives a stronger but slower check. Evaluation cycle mode samples each tau-conditioned phase; cycle_noise_mode may be independent, shared, or harmonic.
